# www.rosecottagecroft.co.uk - Full Site Content

> Rose Cottage Croft is an online store. Use these endpoints to browse products or get information about the shop.

## Endpoints

- `GET /` — Homepage. Contains categories, featured products, and site navigation.
- `GET /search?q={query}` — Search the store for products matching the query.
- `GET /contactus` — Contact information and form.

## Authentication

No authentication is required to browse the store catalog.

## Examples

Search for a product:

```bash
curl https://www.rosecottagecroft.co.uk/search?q=widget
```

## Full Content

This is a placeholder for the full site content. To fully optimize for non-browsing LLMs, this file should contain a concatenated version of the main informational pages of the site (e.g. About Us, Terms, primary product categories).
